channel.title: +Articles on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on देवेषु विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: गोपी
item.description:
Source: TW

गोपी

Neea is Leela in Gaudiya theology not Radha.

This Neela thing is as per Srivaishnavas based on their Southern recension of Harivamsha where a Gopi called Neela married Krishna. That is probably the source of Napinnai character in DP4000.

But I have not seen any solid evidence of the Nila Gopi being the same as Nila/Lila, the consort in Vaikuntha. They derive the connection from the similarity of name.

item.title: सरस्वती-पक्षः
item.description:
These are statements about Purushottamamurti lakshana and Vāsudevamurtilakshana respectively from Hayashirsha Pañcarātra. Here Saraswati and Pushti are equated.

श्री-पूष्टी चापि कर्तव्ये पद्मवीणा-करान्विते ।
ऊरुमात्रोच्छ्रितायामे
किञ्चिद् आवर्जिते तथा ॥८४॥
… श्रीपुष्टिसहितं कुर्याच्
चतुर्बाहुं सुरोत्तमं ।
प्रसादे स्थापयेन्नित्यं गृहे वा मण्डपेऽपि वा ॥२७४॥

अग्नि-पुराणे -

श्रीपुष्टी वापि(/चापि) कर्तव्ये
पद्मवीणाकरान्विते ।
ऊरुमात्रोच्छ्रितायामे …
पद्मवीणासमन्विते
लक्ष्मी-सरस्वती कार्ये,
विश्वरूपो ऽथ दक्षिणे ।

जयदेवः

Source: TW

This verse from Gīta-Govinda may give a hint of what Kavi Jayadeva’s religious affiliation was:
